sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63340" key="limno/xaris" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λιμνό-χᾰρις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n63340.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Grace of the marsh</tr_>, or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λιμνο-χᾰρής</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Love-marsh</tr_>, name of a frog, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:212" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">212</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
